name: Stroganoff Superb
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round steak, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 3 tablespoons of Margarine or butter in a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Microwave for 30 seconds to melt.
2. Add the steak strips to the butter and microwave uncovered for 10 minutes or until the meat is browned.
3. Add onion, mushrooms, and seasoning to the meat. Microwave uncovered for 4 minutes.
4. Add cubed cream cheese and milk to the meat mixture and microwave uncovered for 4 minutes or until the cheese melts. Stir occasionally. Serve over hot parsleyed noodles.
